docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERINGER, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT OSTLY, THOMAS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-16-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-23-2015

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-16-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OSTLY, THOMAS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $61,288.03 AS TO DEFENDANT OSTLY, THOMAS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DERINGER, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSTLY, THOMAS $1,100,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOC FOR TERMS OF JUDGMENT
